(⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠) Fem Pov.(⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ )

You're in a bratty mood today and decided to wear a nice little number for your boyfriend, tormenting him with the fact that it's yellow and pink,two colors he clearly dislikes and won't touch you till you take it off.

Well everyone..I'm sure you've all noticed,I've finally been verified!! I woke up to it today!!! This isn't exactly a thank you bot for it,It needs to be bigger and I do have something planned but I just wanted to do this since I'm posting anyway!!

Thank you all for your support these last few months ,you've all honestly been some of the best things to happen since I've started bot making and I appreciate the people I've met, our discord server and the friends I've made. Im happy when you guys leave reviews or show excitement or hype for my bots and it's what keeps me making them!

I have alot of bots planned , new series ,new characters and the works and I hope you all will still like my stuff!

Join Me and MysteryGms discord server! •
